partners.name: Gemini CAD Systems
partners.description: Gemini CAD Systems, now part of the Lectra family since 2021, specializes in advanced software, hardware, and workflow solutions for industries such as apparel, furniture, and automotive.

partners.name: TKT Brain Power
partners.description: TKT Brain Power is a beacon of determination and innovation in the industry. With an unwavering commitment to quality as non-negotiable, the company delivers high-value solutions swiftly and competitively.

partners.name: Sinajet
partners.description: Founded in 2006, Sinajet manufactures advanced digital cutting systems for industries such as apparel, advertising, packaging, aviation, wind energy, automobiles, electronics, shoemaking, upholstered furniture, home furnishing, and leather goods.
highlights: Big data, IoT, and cloud computing integration
Compatible with existing MES, APS, and WMS

partners.name: Konsan Tech
partners.description: Since 1985, Konsan.tech has been providing innovative automation solutions to the fashion and apparel, furniture, automotive, aerospace, technical textiles, and insulation sectors worldwide.
highlights: Broadest product range in the field

partners.name: GBOS
partners.description: GBOS, China provides smart equipment solutions globally, operating in a 40,000 square meter production area. Specializing in medium and high-end laser and oscillating knife solutions.

partners.name: Jindex
partners.description: Jindex UPC Inkjet Cutter represents a pinnacle of technological innovation with world-first features including double front feed system and simultaneous multi-machine display.
highlights: World's first double front feed system

partners.name: Dopsing
partners.description: Dongguan City Dopsing Machinery Technology CO., Ltd., a subsidiary of KINWAH Group, is a leading Chinese manufacturer of advanced textile equipment with over 20 years of R&D experience.

partners.name: Huatang
partners.description: Tianjin Huatang Sewing Machine Manufacturing Co., Ltd. specializes in high-tech multi-needle double chain stitch and ultra high-speed/safety stitch overlock sewing machines.
